content:
### Logic

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A([ImplementSpec dispatched]) --> B[Agent: implement code only]
    B --> C{cargo build --workspace}
    C -->|exit 0| D[ImplementSpecTests dispatched]
    C -->|exit non-0| E[return status=error, build_output]
    D --> F[Agent: implement tests only]
    F --> G{spec has Test Plan?}
    G -->|no| I[advance to WriteDiff]
    G -->|yes, numeric count| H{diff #test count >= required?}
    H -->|yes| I
    H -->|no| J[return warning, advance anyway]
    J --> I
    I --> K([WriteDiff])
```

### State Machine

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> ImplementSpecCode: first spec
    ImplementSpecCode --> BuildCheck: code dispatched
    BuildCheck --> ImplementSpecTests: build passes
    BuildCheck --> TerminalFailure: build fails
    ImplementSpecTests --> TestCountCheck: tests dispatched
    TestCountCheck --> WriteDiff: all specs done
    TestCountCheck --> ImplementSpecCode: next spec
    WriteDiff --> ReviewSpec: diff captured
    ReviewSpec --> ReviseSpec: REVIEWED
    ReviewSpec --> NextSpec: APPROVED
    ReviseSpec --> ReviewSpec: re-review
    NextSpec --> ImplementSpecCode: more specs
    NextSpec --> AdvanceToMerge: all approved
    TerminalFailure --> [*]: state reset
```

### Interaction

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant M as Mainthread
    participant A as Agent
    participant R as Reviewer

    M->>A: ImplementSpecCode prompt
    A-->>M: code written
    M->>M: cargo build --workspace
    alt build fails
        M-->>M: return error, block Phase 2
    else build passes
        M->>A: ImplementSpecTests prompt
        A-->>M: tests written
        M->>M: count #[test] in diff
        M->>M: advance to WriteDiff
        M->>A: WriteDiff prompt
        A-->>M: sdd_artifact_create_change_implementation
        M->>R: ReviewSpec prompt
        R->>R: read spec ## Test Plan
        alt Test Plan present AND no tests in diff
            R-->>M: verdict=REJECTED (hard rule)
        else
            R-->>M: verdict=APPROVED|REVIEWED
        end
    end
```
